author: lOrm
content: Fixed (forensic): try_parse_relaxed replaced with parse_adversary_response -> Result<AdversaryResponse, ParseError>. Four structured variants: EmptyResponse, NoJsonFound, UnparseableJson(String), WrongShape. parse_findings (triage.rs) now logs the specific variant and returns zero findings - never coerces to NO_FINDINGS. 8 new tests cover each variant + valid input + truly-empty + the #340 exploit string ('The code has a SQL injection on line 42. Note: no findings that are style-related.'). cargo test --lib: 1247 passed (baseline 1239 + 8 new). cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features: exit 0. No #[allow], no clippy.toml, no #[ignore].
